title: CAN 016
description: Gray start to the year with snow. Everything stands still at the edges of the city. Ilford HP5+ at 800.

title: CAN 015
description: Sunny 16 estimates on a cold Sunday in January with Fomapan 200 in the Praktica. Winter sun through 20mm Flektogon.

title: CAN 014
description: Harbor towns and some findings on the way from Lohals to Bagenkop. Revue SC4 loaded with Ilford HP5+.
